hero.title: Research Agent
hero.description: Hello! How can I help with your research today?

items.title: Literature Review
items.description: Synthesize methodologies, outcomes, and domain contradictions across millions of research papers instantly.

items.title: Trend Discovery
items.description: Identify topic velocity and clustering before indicators manifest in mainstream journals.

items.title: Gap Analysis

intelligenceSection.title: Structured intelligence, on any research topic
intelligenceSection.description: Research Agent analyzes any topic and delivers structured, professional insights — helping researchers, students, and industry professionals understand, explore, and innovate within their subject area.
